data.title: Dashan Education Hires Grant Thornton for Forensic Probe into Suspected Financial Irregularities
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Dashan Education Holdings Limited ( (HK:9986) ) has provided an announcement.

Dashan Education Holdings has appointed Grant Thornton Advisory Services Limited as an independent forensic investigator following concerns raised by Hong Kong’s Securities and Futures Commission over material discrepancies between bank statements provided by the company and those obtained independently, as well as alleged overstatement of bank balances in its 2023 financial statements. Acting on the recommendation of a special investigation committee, the forensic probe will examine the background, causes, approval processes, and internal controls surrounding the irregularities, and assess whether there was any misappropriation of assets, document falsification, or management misconduct, marking a significant step in addressing regulatory scrutiny and restoring governance and investor confidence.

More about Dashan Education Holdings Limited

Dashan Education Holdings Limited, incorporated in the Cayman Islands and listed in Hong Kong, operates in the education sector through its group of subsidiaries, though this announcement centres on its governance and regulatory situation rather than its operating businesses.

Average Trading Volume: 2,228,812

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: HK$1.43B

data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Zijin Mining Group Co ( (HK:2899) ) has issued an announcement.

Zijin Mining Group has formalised the terms of reference for its Nomination and Remuneration Committee, a specialised body under the board of directors tasked with overseeing the selection, evaluation and compensation of directors and senior management. The document sets out the committee’s mandate to recommend candidates, define selection criteria and procedures, and design and review remuneration policies and appraisal standards, all of which are submitted to the board or shareholders for approval. The committee will comprise six directors, with a majority of independent directors, gender diversity requirements, and leadership positions held by independent directors, aiming to enhance governance standards, transparency and professionalism in board and executive management decisions.

data.title: MemeStrategy Uses Solana Put Options to Advance Blockchain Expansion and Token Accumulation
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Howkingtech International Holding Limited ( (HK:2440) ) has shared an update.

MemeStrategy, Inc. has entered into a series of over-the-counter Solana put option agreements through its wholly owned subsidiary MemeStrategy Hong Kong Limited with Singapore-licensed QCP Trading Pte. Ltd., allowing QCP to sell up to 43,500 Solana tokens to the group at preset strike prices by 30 January 2026 in exchange for option premiums totaling 317 Solana. The company frames this recurring put-writing strategy as a structured way to accumulate Solana at potentially favorable prices while managing price volatility and generating premium income, with any acquired tokens to be staked on the group’s proprietary validators to deepen participation in the Solana network and support the expansion of its blockchain infrastructure business, funded from existing cash reserves.

More about Howkingtech International Holding Limited

MemeStrategy, Inc., incorporated in the Cayman Islands and listed in Hong Kong, operates a core data management solutions business and is expanding into blockchain-based offerings. The group is focusing on integrating Solana blockchain technology into its services by operating proprietary Solana validators and pursuing an “IoT-meets-Blockchain” strategy that requires the strategic accumulation of Solana tokens to support its blockchain infrastructure and related solutions.

An update from Jutal Offshore Oil Services ( (HK:3303) ) is now available.

Jutal Offshore Oil Services Limited has proposed a non-underwritten rights issue to raise up to approximately HK$56.9 million in gross proceeds by offering 355,547,898 new shares at HK$0.16 each on the basis of one rights share for every six existing shares held by qualifying shareholders on the record date, with estimated net proceeds of about HK$55.1 million assuming full subscription. The new shares will rank pari passu with existing shares, the issue is structured to comply with Hong Kong listing rules without requiring separate shareholder approval, and the company has cautioned investors that the transaction remains conditional on regulatory approvals and may not proceed if those conditions are not satisfied, exposing those trading in existing or nil-paid rights shares to potential deal risk.

Hong Kong Aerospace Technology Group Limited ( (HK:1725) ) has issued an update.

China Strategic Technology Group Limited has provided a supplemental announcement regarding the resignation of director and former deputy chairman H.H. Maktoum, clarifying that despite repeated attempts to obtain further reasons, the only explanation given remains personal reasons and that there is no disagreement between him and the board or any issues requiring shareholder attention. The company detailed a delay in formally acknowledging his resignation due to an earlier email and signed resignation letter sent via his representative to a former company secretary, which was not actioned before that secretary’s own departure, leading to late compliance with disclosure obligations under Hong Kong Listing Rule 13.51(2); however, it stressed that key board meetings and approvals, including interim results and changes to corporate name, headquarters and management, remained validly approved with a proper quorum despite his absence.

Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

Shandong Boan Biotechnology Company., Limited. Class H ( (HK:6955) ) has shared an update.

Shandong Boan Biotechnology has entered into a finance lease agreement with Industrial Bank Financial Leasing under which the bank will purchase certain machinery and equipment from the company for RMB41.1 million and lease them back to Shandong Boan for 36 months, with payments made in 12 quarterly instalments at a floating rate of 40 basis points over the LPR. The transaction, structured as a sale-and-leaseback with a token repurchase price of RMB1 at the end of the term and backed by a third-party guarantee, is intended to replenish the company’s working capital, optimise its mix of long- and short-term financing, and support ongoing operations and strategic initiatives, which the board views as fair, reasonable and in the interests of shareholders.

data.title: Sunshine Lake Pharma Unveils AI-Powered PROTAC R&D Platform to Accelerate Drug Discovery
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Sunshine Lake Pharma Co., Ltd. Class H ( (HK:6887) ) has shared an announcement.

Sunshine Lake Pharma has launched an AI-powered R&D platform specifically tailored to PROTAC (Protein Degradation-Targeting Chimeras) drug mechanisms, creating a closed-loop system from data foundation through dry-lab modeling to wet-lab validation. The core of the platform is a PROTAC-focused database, HEC-PROTAC DB, which now contains more than 30,000 molecules and significantly exceeds public datasets in both scale and structural detail, enabling AI-driven molecular generation and screening to accelerate the rational design and clinical translation of PROTAC lead compounds. The initiative complements the group’s broader AI strategy, which includes six proprietary models spanning molecular design, scaffold hopping, metabolism and toxicity prediction, and formulation, and is reinforced by collaborations with partners such as Beijing DP Technology and Huawei Cloud to strengthen its position in AI-driven drug discovery and potentially improve R&D efficiency and competitiveness in the global pharma landscape.

More about Sunshine Lake Pharma Co., Ltd. Class H

Sunshine Lake Pharma Co., Ltd. is a China-based pharmaceutical company focused on drug research and development, with an increasing strategic emphasis on artificial intelligence–enabled discovery. The group is building a comprehensive “AI + Healthcare” ecosystem, applying proprietary AI models across the drug discovery chain and advancing AI-designed small-molecule candidates such as HEC169584 for metabolic-associated steatohepatitis (MASH), which is already in Phase I clinical trials.

Average Trading Volume: 338,068

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

data.title: DeTai New Energy Faces Trading Suspension as Hong Kong Bourse Rules Operations Insufficient
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest update is out from DeTai New Energy Group ( (HK:0559) ).

The Stock Exchange of Hong Kong’s Listing Committee has upheld an earlier decision by the Listing Division that DeTai New Energy Group has failed to maintain a sufficient level of operations and assets under Listing Rule 13.24, and therefore decided that trading in the company’s shares should be suspended under Rule 6.01(3). In reaching this conclusion, the committee cited the group’s prolonged low revenue and persistent losses in its hotel hospitality business, weak resort occupancy, lack of a proven track record in self-operating the resort after ending its external operator arrangement, and limited progress and funding committed to a planned renovation project, all of which raised doubts about the substance, viability and sustainability of its business and the company’s ability to deliver the turnaround it projects.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:0559) stock is a Hold with a HK$0.21 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on DeTai New Energy Group stock, see the HK:0559 Stock Forecast page.

More about DeTai New Energy Group

DeTai New Energy Group Limited, incorporated in Bermuda and listed in Hong Kong, has shifted away from its former electric bicycles and new energy businesses and now relies primarily on a hotel hospitality segment centered on a resort property. Since this transition, the hospitality operations have remained small in scale, generating modest annual revenue and recurring segment losses, with occupancy rates below 60% over the past three years.

Average Trading Volume: 620,385

data.title: Clarity Medical Group Maintains Market Lead as It Works Toward Trading Resumption
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An announcement from Clarity Medical Group Holding Limited ( (HK:1406) ) is now available.

Clarity Medical Group Holding Limited reported that its ophthalmic healthcare business has remained resilient, with patient visits, new bookings and surgical volumes in December 2025 reaching or surpassing levels from the same period in the previous two years, and the Group retaining its No. 1 ranking in Hong Kong by ICL surgical volume for the third consecutive year. Following the launch of the SILK refractive surgery platform in November 2025 under a partnership with Johnson & Johnson, the company is now the only eye centre in Hong Kong offering a fully comprehensive portfolio of advanced refractive treatments, further reinforcing its technological leadership despite a substantial financial burden from professional fees linked to ongoing allegations by former directors and the continued suspension of trading in its shares while it works to fulfil extensive resumption and governance guidance from the stock exchange.

More about Clarity Medical Group Holding Limited

Clarity Medical Group Holding Limited is a Hong Kong-based provider of ophthalmic healthcare services, specialising in advanced refractive eye surgeries. Through partnerships such as its collaboration with Johnson & Johnson, the Group offers a comprehensive suite of procedures including LASIK, SMILE, SMILE Pro, SILK and ICL, targeting patients seeking corrective eye surgery and positioning itself as a technology leader in Hong Kong’s ophthalmology market.

Beijing Fourth Paradigm Technology Co. Ltd. Class H ( (HK:6682) ) has provided an announcement.

Phancy Group Co., Ltd. has officially changed its English name from Beijing Fourth Paradigm Technology Co., Ltd. to Phancy Group Co., Ltd., effective 7 January 2026, with a corresponding change to its Chinese name pending shareholder approval at an upcoming extraordinary general meeting. The company emphasized that the name change will not affect shareholders’ rights, existing share certificates, daily operations or financial position, and that current share certificates bearing the old name will remain valid for trading and settlement, while new certificates will be issued under the new name. In tandem, the stock short name for its H shares on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange will change from “FOURTH PARADIGM” to “PHANCY” in English, and to a new Chinese short name, with effect from 20 January 2026, while the stock code will remain 6682, ensuring continuity for investors despite the branding transition.

data.description:

An announcement from Carry Wealth Holdings Limited ( (HK:0643) ) is now available.

Carry Wealth Holdings Limited has disclosed that a conditional mandatory general cash offer to acquire all its issued shares not already held by the joint offerors has lapsed after receiving minimal shareholder support. As of the first closing date on 14 January 2026, valid acceptances covered just 590,000 shares, or about 0.06% of the company’s issued share capital, leaving the joint offerors and their concert parties with an aggregate 45.77% stake, below the level required to satisfy the offer condition and effect a change in control, meaning the company’s ownership structure and market positioning remain largely unchanged for existing shareholders.

The company is subject to Hong Kong’s Takeovers Code and related securities regulations that govern changes in control and general offers for its issued share capital.
